title: Pleurothallis scariosa
taxonomy: Pleurothallis scariosa is classified within the kingdom Plantae, with further classification as follows: it belongs to the phylum Angiospermophyta, class Liliopsida, order Asparagales, family Orchidaceae, and genus Pleurothallis. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships. The family Orchidaceae, also known as the orchid family, is the largest family of flowering plants. The genus Pleurothallis is a group of small to medium-sized epiphytic orchids native to Central and South America. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary history and relationships with other organisms.
uses: Pleurothallis scariosa, a species of orchid, is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
